title: polypodium lineare f. steniste
intro: Polypodium lineare f. steniste is a species of fern, specifically a type of creeping fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypodium lineare f. steniste are believed to be due to its ability to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, and it is also used to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice or salve.
